Venue Info
Media Gallery
Germain Amphitheater
Columbus, OH
Previous Names:
Polaris Amphitheater (Changed after 2002)
Seating Capacity: 20000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 17
  DMB  (16)
  Dave solo  (1)

Longest Performance:
06.08.05 - Seek Up (25:08)

Song Liberations
  6.17.03 – Last Stop, The (after 1437 days)
  6.17.03 – Typical Situation (after 1025 days)
  6.18.03 – Pay for What You Get (after 1442 days)
  6.18.03 – Cry Freedom (after 1439 days)
  6.18.03 – Dreaming Tree, The (after 1412 days)
  6.18.03 – Maker, The (after 1023 days)
  6.7.06 – Big Eyed Fish (after 1399 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Germain Amphitheater was located East of I-71, just north of the I-270 loop in northern Columbus, Ohio. In 2002, Germain Motor Company (a conglomeration of car dealerships) bought the naming rights to the venue, which had originally been named after the Polaris development in which the venue was built.

The venue was closed following the 2007 concert season and ultimately demolished in 2012.
